name: omni
title: Omni
description: Real-time transcription powered by Omni. Start/stop transcription, manage input devices, and check status.
author: aremuio

commands.name: toggle-transcription
commands.title: Toggle Transcription
commands.description: Start or stop real-time transcription using your default stop mode.

commands.name: transcribe-copy
commands.title: Transcribe & Copy
commands.description: Start or stop real-time transcription. Copies transcript when stopped.

commands.name: input-devices
commands.title: Select Input Device
commands.description: List and select audio input devices for transcription.

commands.name: status
commands.title: Omni Status
commands.description: View daemon status, transcription state, and configuration.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: Omni Doctor
commands.description: Run health checks on your Omni setup.

preferences.name: omniBinary
preferences.title: Omni Binary Path
preferences.description: Path to the omni binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH / npm global.

preferences.name: stopMode
preferences.title: Default Stop Mode
preferences.description: What to do with transcribed text when stopping via Toggle Transcription.
